headline: ACM Research to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: ACMR Q1 results are likely to benefit from strong revenue growth and global expansion, but margin pressure and falling earnings may temper the outlook.

raw.headline: ACM Research to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
raw.summary: ACMR Q1 results are likely to benefit from strong revenue growth and global expansion, but margin pressure and falling earnings may temper the outlook.

headline: Microchip to Report Q4 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
summary: MCHP reports fiscal Q4 earnings on May 7, guiding sales of $1.26B and earnings of 48-52 cents per share as backlog, mix shifts and easing inventory support growth.

raw.headline: Microchip to Report Q4 Earnings: What's in Store for the Stock?
raw.summary: MCHP reports fiscal Q4 earnings on May 7, guiding sales of $1.26B and earnings of 48-52 cents per share as backlog, mix shifts and easing inventory support growth.

headline: CDW to Participate in the J.P. Morgan 2026 Global Technology, Media & Communications Conference
summary: VERNON HILLS, Ill., May 05, 2026--CDW Corporation (Nasdaq: CDW) today announced that Christine A. Leahy, chair and chief executive officer, and Albert J. Miralles, chief financial officer and executive vice president, enterprise business operations, CDW, will participate in a question and answer session at the J.P. Morgan 2026 Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference in Boston, Massachusetts on Tuesday, May 19, 2025, at 10:25 a.m. CT/11:25 a.m. ET. The session will be webcast live
